Bash(cd /d/project/ThaitextSegmentersystem/backend && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 source venv/Scripts/activate && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python - << 'EOF'
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/models'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils/utils'\)

from word_segmentation import WordSegmenter
ws = WordSegmenter\('models/lst20_dictionary.pkl'\)

units = ['แห้ง', 'แล้ง']
n = len\(units\)

for start in range\(n\):
    cands = ws._generate_candidates_from_units\(units, start\)
    print\(f'Candidates at pos {start}: {[c for c,_ in cands]}'\)
    for cand, length in cands:
        s = ws._score_candidate_v2\(cand, length, start, n, None, units[start+1:]\)
        freq = ws._get_word_frequency\(cand\)
        print\(f'  {repr\(cand\):20} unit_len={length}  freq={freq:.2f}  score={s:.3f}  in_dict={ws.dictionary.contains\(cand\)}'\)
EOF)

Bash(cd /d/project/ThaitextSegmentersystem/backend && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 source venv/Scripts/activate && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python - << 'EOF'
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/models'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils/utils'\)

from word_segmentation import WordSegmenter
ws = WordSegmenter\('models/lst20_dictionary.pkl'\)

tests = [
    \(['แห้ง', 'แล้ง'],               'แห้งแล้ง'\),
    \(['ล้ำ', 'ค่า'],                 'ล้ำค่า'\),
    \(['อย่าง', 'มาก'],               'อย่างมาก'\),
    \(['ภัย', 'ธรรม', 'ชา', 'ติ'],    'ภัย|ธรรมชาติ'\),
    \(['และ', 'ประ', 'เทศ'],          'และ|ประเทศ'\),
    \(['มาก', 'สุด'],                  'มากสุด or มาก|สุด'\),
]
for mtus, expected in tests:
    result = ws.segment_with_viterbi\(mtus\)
    print\(f'{"  |  ".join\(mtus\):30} -> {"  |  ".join\(result\):25}  \(expected: {expected}\)'\)
EOF)

Bash(cd /d/project/ThaitextSegmentersystem/backend && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 source venv/Scripts/activate && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python - << 'EOF'
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/models'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils/utils'\)

from word_segmentation import WordSegmenter
ws = WordSegmenter\('models/lst20_dictionary.pkl'\)

tests = [
    \(['แห้ง', 'แล้ง'],               'แห้งแล้ง'\),
    \(['ล้ำ', 'ค่า'],                 'ล้ำค่า'\),
    \(['อย่าง', 'มาก'],               'อย่างมาก'\),
    \(['ภัย', 'ธรรม', 'ชา', 'ติ'],   'ภัย|ธรรมชาติ'\),
    \(['และ', 'ประ', 'เทศ'],          'และ|ประเทศ'\),
    \(['ของ', 'การ'],                  'ของ|การ'\),
    \(['ความ', 'เสี่ยง'],             'ความเสี่ยง'\),
]
for mtus, expected in tests:
    result = ws.segment_with_viterbi\(mtus\)
    ok = '✓' if '|'.join\(result\) == expected or len\(result\) < len\(mtus\) and expected.count\('|'\) < len\(mtus\)-1 else ''
    print\(f'{"  |  ".join\(mtus\):30} -> {"  |  ".join\(result\):25}  \(expected: {expected}\)'\)
EOF)

Bash(cd /d/project/ThaitextSegmentersystem/backend && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 source venv/Scripts/activate && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python - << 'EOF'
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/models'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils/utils'\)

from word_segmentation import WordSegmenter
ws = WordSegmenter\('models/lst20_dictionary.pkl'\)

# Trace scores at current settings
words_to_check = ['แห้ง', 'แล้ง', 'แห้งแล้ง', 'ของ', 'การ', 'ของการ',
                  'ความ', 'เสี่ยง', 'ความเสี่ยง', 'ภัยธรรมชาติ', 'ภัย', 'ธรรมชาติ']
print\("Word frequencies:"\)
for w in words_to_check:
    freq = ws._get_word_frequency\(w\)
    score = freq * 0.3 + 2.0
    print\(f"  {w:15} freq={freq:.2f}  word_score={score:.2f}  in_dict={ws.dictionary.contains\(w\)}"\)
EOF)

Bash(cd /d/project/ThaitextSegmentersystem/backend && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 source venv/Scripts/activate && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python - << 'EOF'
import sys, io, pickle
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/models'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts/nlp_utils/utils'\)

from features import segment_text_to_mtus
from word_segmentation import WordSegmenter

with open\('models/mtu_crf_model.pkl', 'rb'\) as f:
    mtu_crf = pickle.load\(f\)

ws = WordSegmenter\('models/lst20_dictionary.pkl'\)

text = "แห้งแล้งล้ำค่า"
mtus_nested, _, _ = segment_text_to_mtus\(text, mtu_crf\)
mtus = ["".join\(m\) for m in mtus_nested]
print\("MTUs:", " | ".join\(mtus\)\)
print\("Viterbi:", " | ".join\(ws.segment_with_viterbi\(mtus\)\)\)
EOF)

Bash(cd D:/project/ThaitextSegmentersystem && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import math, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'backend/scripts/models'\)
from lst20_dictionary_builder import LST20Dictionary
d = LST20Dictionary.load\('backend/models/lst20_dictionary.pkl'\)
words = ['ที่', 'ที่นี่', 'ที่สุด', 'นี่', 'สุด', 'สุดๆ', 'ๆ', 'ฝนตก', 'ฝน', 'ตก', 'อีกแล้ว', 'อีก', 'แล้ว', 'คืนนี้', 'คืน', 'นี้']
for w in words:
    total = sum\(d.word_to_pos[w].values\(\)\) if w in d.word_to_pos else 0
    freq = math.log\(total + 1\)
    score_single = freq * 0.2 + 2.5
    score_compound = freq * 0.2 + 2.5 + 4.5  # if 2-unit compound
    print\(f'{w}: count={total}, freq_log={freq:.2f}, single_score={score_single:.2f}, as_compound_score={score_compound:.2f}'\)
" 2>&1 | grep -v "^📦\\|^📚\\|^Loading")

Bash(cd D:/project/ThaitextSegmentersystem && PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import math, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'backend/scripts/models'\)
from lst20_dictionary_builder import LST20Dictionary
d = LST20Dictionary.load\('backend/models/lst20_dictionary.pkl'\)

def split_score\(w1, w2\):
    t1 = sum\(d.word_to_pos[w1].values\(\)\) if w1 in d.word_to_pos else 0
    t2 = sum\(d.word_to_pos[w2].values\(\)\) if w2 in d.word_to_pos else 0
    return math.log\(t1+1\)*0.2+2.5 + math.log\(t2+1\)*0.2+2.5

pairs = [\('นักเรียน','นัก','เรียน'\), \('ชั่วช้า','ชั่ว','ช้า'\), \('อากาศ','อา','กาศ'\)]
for compound, w1, w2 in pairs:
    sp = split_score\(w1, w2\)
    t = sum\(d.word_to_pos[compound].values\(\)\) if compound in d.word_to_pos else 0
    base = math.log\(t+1\)*0.2 + 2.5
    needed = sp - base
    print\(f'{compound}\(count={t}\): bonus_needed_to_merge={needed:.2f}'\)
" 2>&1 | grep -v "^📦\\|^📚\\|^Loading\\|^📖")
